product.name: Monolith Engine
product.description: Enterprise-grade business operating ecosystem consolidating HRMS, CRM, Attendance, Asset Management, Accounting, Recruitment, Communication, and AI assistant into one unified platform.
product.vision: One unified core for total operational command — eliminating data silos, manual spreadsheets, and disconnected tools.

modules.name: Core Platform
modules.description: Authentication, session management, user management, RBAC, notifications, theme system

modules.name: HRMS Module
modules.description: Employee management, org structure, letters, onboarding, payroll, salary structure, files, helpdesk

modules.name: Attendance Engine
modules.description: Biometric sync, punch tracking, shift management, overtime calculations, leave management

modules.name: Appraisal Management (AMS)
modules.description: Performance cycles, self-assessment, reviewer ratings, hike decisions, meeting scheduling

modules.name: CRM Module
modules.description: Leads, contacts, accounts, deals, quotes, invoices, tickets, mobile app

modules.name: CHA Module
modules.description: Job lifecycle, checklist management, filing workflows, document control, expenses

modules.name: Communication Module
modules.description: Gmail integration, Google Chat, email dispatch, announcements

modules.name: Recruitment (Recruit)
modules.description: Job postings, candidate management, applications, interviews, offers, job seeker portal

modules.name: Accounting Module
modules.description: Chart of accounts, journal entries, invoices, payments, general ledger

modules.name: To-Do & Reminders
modules.description: Task creation, subtasks, reminders, notification triggers

modules.name: Expense Management
modules.description: Reimbursements, receipt OCR, approval workflows, ledger posting

modules.name: Mona AI Assistant
modules.description: AI chat assistant, product knowledge, workspace companion

workflows.name: CHA Job Lifecycle
workflows.description: Creation → Assignment → Checklist → Filing → First Check → Second Check → Completion

workflows.name: HR Letter Generation
workflows.description: Template Selection → Variable Fill → Manager Approval → PDF Generation → Email Dispatch

workflows.name: Appraisal Cycle
workflows.description: Schedule → Reviewer Assignment → Self-Assessment → Multi-Rater → Meeting → Hike Decision

workflows.name: Lead-to-Customer
workflows.description: Lead Import → Contact → Qualification → Quote → Approval → Invoice

workflows.name: Attendance Processing
workflows.description: Biometric Sync → Punch Validation → OT Calculation → Payroll Export

workflows.name: Recruitment Pipeline
workflows.description: Job Opening → Applications → Screening → Interview → Offer → Onboarding Handoff

workflows.name: Mobile Check-In/Out
workflows.description: Face Detection → GPS Capture → Server Validation → Session Start → Heartbeat Tracking → Check-Out

roadmap.description: Mona AI with RAG + Google Chat Bot
